description: REQ-TAG-005 requires an inline tag input field with autocomplete dropdown sourced from TagInventory.entries. The implementation sets tagAutocompleteVisibleFor state (feedReducer.ts:158-163) but FeedRow.svelte never renders an <input> element or autocomplete dropdown based on this state. grep for 'tag-input|tagInput|autocomplete|tag-autocomplete' in FeedRow.svelte returns zero hits. This also invalidates REQ-TAG-006 (TagError UI), REQ-TAG-007 (Escape/Blur dismissal), and EC-001 through EC-007c (input edge cases).

additionalEvidence.description: TagAddClicked sets tagAutocompleteVisibleFor but no corresponding UI to render the input
